political.s: FEC: $9K PAC donations; 72% to Republican, 28% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

charity.s: $65M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.04% of revenue) via Ford Motor Company Fund.

environment.s: Climate Action 100+ 2026 Net Zero Benchmark — disclosure 4/5, alignment 3/5, governance 3/5, capital allocation 3/5.

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture.

privacy.s: CFPB consumer complaints: 4568 on record (100 in past 12mo); 99% timely response rate.

wiki.extract: The Ford Motor Company is an American multinational automobile manufacturer headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan, United States. It was founded by Henry Ford and incorporated on June 16, 1903. The company sells automobiles and commercial vehicles under the Ford brand, and luxury cars under its Lincoln brand. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the single-letter ticker symbol F, and is controlled by the Ford family. They have minority ownership, but a plurality of the voting power.

cases.caseName: FORD v. COMPASS GROUP USA, INC. D/B/A OCCASIONS CATERERS

fec.committeeName: FORD MOTOR COMPANY CIVIC ACTION FUND

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: Consumer Reports 2026 Brand Report Card: ranked #18 of ~26 auto brands.

sampleRecords.employer: Ford Motor Company - Chicago Stamping Plant
sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by object pushed or pulled by person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: Two employees were sliding a 200-pound steel mounting plate off a worktable onto the forks of a forklift. They slid the plate until it was half on the table and half on the forklift, and were making an adjustment to get the plate fully on the forklift when the plate pinched one employee's left ring finger. He suffered a partial amputation to the fingertip.

An employee was backing an electric industrial carrier into a dolly when their fingers were caught between the vehicle and the bar on the line resulting in amputation of the fingertips on their right middle and ring fingers.

sampleRecords.employer: Ford Motor Company - Buffalo Stamping Plant
sampleRecords.nature: Multiple severe wounds and internal injuries
sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: The injured employee was cleaning a stamping die. At the same time, two other employees were moving a separate die that contacted a third die and it slid into the injured employee, pinching his feet between two dies. The employee sustained fractures to both feet and an avulsion injury to the left foot.

sampleRecords.nature: Open wounds involving internal organs, major blood vessels
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by other falling object  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A forklift struck an overhead fan and some racking. The fan fell onto an employee working on the dock, who suffered lacerations and ruptures to the spleen and liver. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working with an electric socket gun while training another employee. The trigger on the socket gun was activated and the employee's glove became caught, resulting in an amputation of the right index finger below the knuckle.

sampleRecalls.title: Pool Heaters Recalled by Pentair Water Pool and Spa Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Pentair Water Pool and Spa StaRite and Mastertemp pool heaters sold in various styles and models with manufacturing dates between December 22, 2020 and January 6, 2021. The manufacturing date, along with model number, can be found on the serial number sticker on the heater. Recalled Pool Heater Mo…
hazards: A connection in the heater can leak the combustible air-gas mixture, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: No incidents or injuries have been reported.
units: About 4,700 (In addition, about 21 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: Residential Elevators Recalls Elevators Due to Impact Hazard (Recall Alert)
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves traction residential elevators with models LLT-952, LLT-953, LLT-954 and LLT-955 shipped and installed between January 2014 and April 2017. The recalled elevators are used in consumers' homes. "Residential Elevators" is printed on the light in the operating panel inside the elevator cab.
hazards: The elevator cab can rise unexpectedly to the top of the elevator shaft and abruptly stop, posing an impact hazard to any occupants in the elevator cab.
injuries: The firm has confirmed eight reports of a failure in the motor gearbox assembly. No injuries have been reported.

"Essential Trading Post," "Wintergreen Oil" or "Birch Oil" are printed on the green and white label. The essential oils were sold in 1 dram (4 mL), 0.5 fl. oz (15 mL), 1 fl. oz (30 mL), 2 fl. oz (60 mL), 4 fl. oz (120 mL)…

hazards: The fork's lower leg assembly can break and cause the rider to lose control, posing crash and injury hazards.
products: RockShox Lyrik and RockShox Yari front suspension forks
